creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

Thanks, I'm not sure this is still an issue. I'm in the process of updating this port, can you please test with the patch in bug 212471? And if it's still an issue, send a copy of the scripts/linux/pam.d/vmtoolsd file itself? Figuring out the changes to from a diff of a diff against a diff of a diff is too confusing for me, sorry.
